summary: Iteration 105 - ROI Calculator, Knowledge Export/Import, Training WebSocket. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: ROI Calculator renders with StatCards, empty state, period selector. Export/Import buttons exist in AgentTraining component.
critical_code_review_comments: All ROI endpoints properly aggregate from reporting_events collection
Knowledge export includes Content-Disposition header for browser download
Knowledge import correctly checks for duplicate content before inserting
WebSocket endpoint registered via app (not api_router) for /ws/training/{session_id}
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ITER105_Import and TEST_ITER105_Duplicate content via knowledge import tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 105 features verified: 1) ROI Calculator - 4 endpoints (summary, by-model, by-agent, forecast) all return proper structure. Empty state handled gracefully with 'insufficient_data' trend. 2) Knowledge Export - returns nexus_knowledge_pack_v1 format with chunks, sessions, stats. Content-Disposition header triggers download. 3) Knowledge Import - validates format, rejects empty chunks, skips duplicates by content match, creates training session. 4) Training WebSocket at /ws/training/{session_id} accepts connections. Frontend UI verified via screenshot: ROI Calculator shows at /workspace/{ws}?tab=roi under Insights menu with StatCards (Total Cost, Time Saved, ROI Multiplier, Messages) and period selector (7d/30d/90d). AgentTraining has Export/Import buttons in header.

roi_calculator_backend.summary_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/workspaces/{ws}/roi/summary returns costs, volume, roi sections
roi_calculator_backend.by_agent_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/workspaces/{ws}/roi/by-agent returns agents array with roi field
roi_calculator_backend.forecast_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/workspaces/{ws}/roi/forecast returns trend, forecast array
roi_calculator_backend.empty_state: PASS - Returns valid structure with zero values when no data

roi_calculator_frontend.stat_cards: PASS - 4 StatCards (Total Cost, Time Saved, ROI Multiplier, Messages)
roi_calculator_frontend.empty_state_card: PASS - Shows 'No usage data yet for this period' when no data
roi_calculator_frontend.navigation: PASS - Accessible via Insights > ROI Calculator or ?tab=roi

knowledge_export.content_disposition: PASS - Header set for file download
knowledge_export.includes_chunks: PASS - Chunks array with content, topic, category

knowledge_import.empty_chunks_validation: PASS - Rejects packs with no chunks
knowledge_import.creates_chunks: PASS - Inserts new chunks with session tracking
knowledge_import.skips_duplicates: PASS - Detects duplicate content and skips

mocked_apis.note: All endpoints use real MongoDB data aggregation
